revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初五]][[zh:四月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 5|qq=April 5}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Eien|en|Eien|qid=Q1324864|lt=Eien|1=Eien}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|987|en|987|qid=Q23644|lt=987|1=987}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|qid=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}}) – {{ill|Kanna (era)|en|Kanna (era)|qid=Q1327053|lt=Kanna|1=Kanna (era)}} より永延に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1609|en|1609|qid=Q6762|lt=1609|1=1609}} {{ill|May 8|en|May 8|qid=Q2555|lt=May 8|1=May 8}}) – {{ill|Ryukyu (disambiguation)|en|Ryukyu (disambiguation)|qid=Q27996|lt=Ryukyu|1=Ryukyu (disambiguation)}} (from {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}}) no {{ill|Shō Nei|en|Shō Nei|qid=Q907317|lt=Shō Nei|1=Shō Nei}} が {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} 主・{{ill|Shimazu Iehisa|en|Shimazu Iehisa|qid=Q1133219|lt=Shimazu Iehisa|1=Shimazu Iehisa}} に降伏. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|qid=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} が大坂再征の為に駿府を出発. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1664|en|1664|qid=Q7581|lt=1664|1=1664}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|qid=Q2536|lt=April 30|1=April 30}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} が{{ill|Kanbun Shuin Kaikō|ja|寛文朱印改|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanbun Shuin Kaikō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 寛文印知|1=Kanbun Shuin Kaikō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11457491}} を行って、全ての大名の所領を確定させる. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|qid=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}}) – {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|en|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|qid=Q1189121|lt=Tokyo-fu|1=Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)}} が女子の断髪禁止令を発布. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}}) – {{ill|Irie Kuichi|ja|入江九一|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Irie Kuichi|1=Irie Kuichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11388933}} 、{{ill|Chōshū Domain|en|Chōshū Domain|qid=Q876267|lt=Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain}} 士（+ {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}}）. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|April 27|en|April 27|qid=Q2533|lt=April 27|1=April 27}}) – {{ill|Uchida Rohan|ja|内田魯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchida Rohan|1=Roan Uchida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394384}} 、{{ill|Critic|ja|批評家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Critic|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 評論家|1=Critic|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6430706}} ・{{ill|Novelist|en|Novelist|qid=Q6625963|lt=Novelist|1=Novelist}} （+ {{ill|1929|en|1929|qid=Q18792|lt=1929|1=1929}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Hōō|ja|宝応|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōō|1=Baoying|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10956217}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|762|en|762|qid=Q30324|lt=762|1=762}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|qid=Q2547|lt=May 3|1=May 3}}) – {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11572271}} 、{{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang Dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}} の6代Emperor（* {{ill|685|en|685|qid=Q33480|lt=685|1=685}}）. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|qid=Q2536|lt=April 30|1=April 30}}) – {{ill|Takadaya Kahei|en|Takadaya Kahei|qid=Q4450102|lt=Takadaya Kabei|1=Takadaya Kahei}} 、海運業者・国後島沖でロシア軍艦に拿捕される（* {{ill|1769|en|1769|qid=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}}）. == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|4|4|6|3|5|5|4|0405|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 4월 5일]] [[ja:4月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月初五]]
[[ar:April 5 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初五]]
